title: RRCraft
description: A medieval-oriented modpack that doesn't stray from vanilla. With slight realism and with grueling summers and winters.
body:
## RRCraft (RealRealCraft) modpack
![A before and as it is snowing image of a Minecraft cottage on a mountain range with a sunset and a bridge in the background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efbe1da11a091a32ce415880470e888f18f44454_0.webp)

<details>
<summary></summary>
  
[Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) was used in the pictures!

</details>


Ever wanted to experience what life was like in the olden times? Look no further! With realistic weapon handling and grueling seasons to bare, life couln't be better/worse!

RRCraft is a semi-realistic modpack, but which still retains aspects of vanilla, with cinematic  biomes, armors, weapons, seasons and seasonal farming, furniture and more.

The seasons-tempurature combo is the main obsticale of this modpack. With chill springs and beautiful autumns, to scorching hot summers and freezing cold winters.

![Player standing on a peak of a snowy mountain with knight armor looking at a sunset with a mountain range on the sides](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fb7fca47ba43c16cdc36c25bc2cedf59865e9fd_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>Disclaimers</summary>

I have not and do not claim that I have made any mods in this modpack.

This modpack is serious, and all the goofyness of the name and updates are just me being unfunny.\
The modpack is not a joke, I am.

**_!!RRCraft is NOT associated with RLCraft or trying to replicate it!!_**

</details>
